response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile senior generalist with nearly two decades of hands-on development across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, and his current AI-agent tooling work aligns with the AI-first emphasis. However, the role is a Principal (IC6) position centered on experimentation and growth systems, and the resume shows no experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis, nor evidence of principal-level scope such as leading multi-workstream, cross-team platform initiatives. His scale credential at Sociomantic is genuine, but the core domain and seniority requirements are unmet.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering experience (15+ years) spanning web, embedded, and low-latency backend systems
Real high-scale production experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI-acceleration preferred qualification
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience whatsoever
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC at small-to-mid companies; no demonstrated principal-level, multi-team architectural leadership
No evidence of data/statistics aptitude, metrics design, or telemetry infrastructure ownership required by the role

key_factors.factor: Missing experimentation and telemetry domain experience
Strong general engineering fundamentals and large-scale systems exposure
